title: Login not working
description: User cannot log in with correct credentials; problem occurs on multiple devices and browsers consistently.

title: Payment failed
description: Payment fails repeatedly during checkout even with valid card details, preventing completion of customer orders.

title: UI alignment issue
description: Buttons and text fields overlap on small screen devices, making the interface difficult to navigate properly.

title: Password reset email not received
description: Customer requests password reset but never receives email; possibly caused by spam filters or system delays.

title: App crashes on launch
description: Mobile application crashes immediately upon opening on both Android and iOS, preventing users from accessing content.

title: Slow page load
description: Dashboard loads very slowly during peak hours, causing frustration and reducing overall productivity for users.

title: Profile update not saving
description: Changes in profile information such as phone number and name are not saved after submission successfully.

title: Email notifications delayed
description: System-generated notification emails arrive several hours late, causing customers to miss timely updates and alerts.

title: Search not returning results
description: Search feature returns no results even for correct and frequently used keywords, frustrating users significantly.

title: Incorrect invoice amount
description: Invoice total does not match order summary, creating confusion and trust issues for the customer immediately.

title: Unable to upload files
description: Customers cannot upload documents or images due to timeout errors, affecting both small and large file sizes.

title: Logout button missing
description: Logout option is missing in navigation menu, preventing users from securely signing out after finishing sessions.

title: Two-factor authentication error
description: OTP codes are rejected even when entered correctly within valid time, blocking users from logging into accounts.

title: Broken link on help page
description: Help page contains links that lead to non-existent or broken pages, preventing access to support information easily.

title: Data not syncing
description: User data does not sync across multiple devices, causing inconsistencies in preferences, history, and application settings.
